run_purpose: Observe corroboration behavior; do not treat pass/fail as product proof.

cases.expected_behavior: collision_system detected; runtime log + gameplay-style screenshot; expect medium corroboration, modality_diversity near 1.0, weighted_corroboration_score 1.0, few or no conflicts.
Code suggests collision_system but no accepted runtime.log and no runtime-scoped screenshots; expect missing_runtime_corroboration_flags / system_detected_without_any_runtime_artifact.
Runtime log mentions collision-like events but code does not register collision_system; expect corroboration_conflicts including runtime_log_present_without_matching_system.

Runtime screenshots only (no logs); code detects collision_system; screenshot basename/path must include a collision_rule token (e.g. 'collision'); expect corroboration with two modalities, weighted 0.7, diversity 0.67, strength typically weak (visual-only corroboration).

collision_system from code + one collision-tagged screenshot + minimal log that does not match collision log rules (e.g. scene load only); expect weak strength when confidence stays below medium threshold; may emit runtime_log_present_without_matching_system if log mentions scene_flow but scene_flow is not code-detected (observe noise vs signal).

note: Fill observed_friction and unexpected_result after manual review; do not auto-tune thresholds from a single run.
